name: Wrath of the Abyss
descriptionTemplate: Pontos gains [Arg2]% Base Aliemus. {Rouse}: For every 3 {Gaunts} in the deck, {Relentless Hunt} gains 1 stack of {Pack Hunt}. For every 1 Pontos Card played, the Temporary {STR▼} effect of the next {Relentless Hunt} +[Arg3]%, which triggers up to 3 times per turn.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Pontos gains [Arg2]% Base Aliemus. {Rouse}: For every 2 {Gaunts} in the deck, {Relentless Hunt} gains 1 stack of {Pack Hunt}. For every 1 Pontos Card played, the Temporary {STR▼} effect of the next {Relentless Hunt} +[Arg3]%, which triggers up to 3 times per turn. Gain +[Energy:Arg4] Aliemus at the {ordinal:1st} play of "Strike" and "Defense" each turn.
